meta.title: Identifying Malware In Factory Program Files
meta.description:
Classic AV/EDR has not yet been effective at identifying OT malware in factory program files. Mars presents a novel multimodel AI approach to do the detection in this session.

The data to train the model came from large scale, real world factories over a year long period. Mars goes over the approach and how it led to capture over 10 OT malware variants in the 50,000+ factory program files analyzed.

Subscribe to Dale’s ICS Security: Friday News & Notes email here:
https://friday.dale-peterson.com/signup
Check out S4x26. Feb 23 - 26 in Miami South Beach:
https://s4xevents.com
